zh.lifeSummary: 當John Holme於1526年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾梅時，他的父親William Holme45歲，母親Katherine Hildyard43歲。他於1557年與Ann Aislaby在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1564年在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾霍爾梅享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁包爾。

nameMeanings.name: Holme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern England): variant of   Holm   and of   Home   3 and 4.
Danish and Swedish: variant of   Holm   1.

variants.name: Holm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Anders, Thor, Holger, Nels, Nils, Sven, Helmer, Lennart, Niels, Vibeke.

English, Scottish, German, and Scandinavian: topographic name for someone who lived on an island, in particular a piece of slightly raised land lying in a fen or partly surrounded by streams, from Middle English, Middle Low German holm, Old Norse holmr, or else a habitational name from a place called with this element. The Swedish name is often ornamental.

English: topographic name for someone who lived where holly grew, from Middle English holm, a divergent development of Old English hole(g)n ‘holly (tree)’; or, especially in southern England, a habitational name from any of the places such as East and West Holme (Dorset) or Holne (Devon). Compare Hollis .

variants.name: Holmes
meanings: English: either from the plural form of Holme , or else a variant of Holme or Home , with excrescent -s (see Holm ).

Scottish: probably a habitational name from Holmes near Dundonald (Ayrshire), or possibly from another place so called in the barony of Inchestuir (Angus). Both placenames likely derive from the plural form of Middle English, Older Scots holm ‘islet, raised land in a marsh’ (see Holm ).

Scottish and Irish: adopted for Scottish Gaelic and Irish Mac Thómais, Mac Thómais (see McComb ). In parts of western Ireland, Holmes is also a variant of Cavish, from Gaelic Mac Thámhais, another patronymic from Thomas . Early bearers in Ireland were probably immigrants from Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Holme was born in 1526, in Holme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Holme, was 45 and his mother, Katherine Hildyard, was 43. He married Ann Aislaby in 1557, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1564, in Holme, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Paull, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Ann Aislaby en 1557, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1564, à Holme, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Paull, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Holme(이)가 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Holme(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Hildyard(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1557년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ann Aislaby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1564년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 홀에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 폴에 묻혔다.

Он умер в 1564 г. в местности холм, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности поулл, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Ann Aislaby en 1557, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1564, en Holme, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Paull, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
